---
title: "Week 11 --- Multicollinearity"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 11 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Nature & Detection | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Consequences | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | VIF & Remedies in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
